name: chat2skill
description: Capture coding-agent conversations into Chat2Skill and retrieve learned skills for future prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Learn and retrieve skills from your daily agent conversations.
interface.longDescription: Chat2Skill captures conversations after each session, sends them to the Chat2Skill cloud extraction API (using your own LLM api key), stores the learned skills locally under ~/.chat2skill, and injects relevant skills into new conversations.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Chat2Skill to update or retrieve learned skills from my conversations.
